heading: Annual report
label: 997 Annual report
text: The Commission shall report annually to the Judicial Conference of the United States, the Congress, and the President of the United States on the activities of the Commission.
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as an Effective Date; Savings Provision note under , Crimes and Criminal Procedure.Oct. 12, 1984section 235(a)(1)(B)(i) of Pub. L. 98–473section 3551 of Title 18
